title: 2010-2015 Lexus RX450h Hybrid Engine Air Filter Replacement Instructions
description: Master Technician Viktor G shows the DIY how-to removal, inspection and installation procedure.

items.name: Genuine Lexus/Toyota engine air filter (original filter that had the fiberglass pre-filter on it PN 17801-0P070 has been superseded to PN 17802-YZZ14 without the pre-filter)
Automotive trim and clip removal kit
